question: VAT register garna kati turnover chahiyo?
question_ne: VAT register garna kati turnover chahiyo?
question_en: What is the VAT registration threshold?
question_normalized: vat register garna kati turnover chahiyo
answer_ne: Annual turnover Rs 50 lakh (goods) athawa Rs 20 lakh (services) bhanda badhi bhaye VAT mandatory registration garna parcha. Voluntary registration pani garna sakincha.
answer_en: VAT registration is mandatory if annual turnover exceeds Rs 50 lakh for goods or Rs 20 lakh for services. Voluntary registration is also allowed.
answer_short_ne: Annual turnover Rs 50 lakh (goods) athawa Rs 20 lakh (services) bhanda badhi bhaye VAT mandatory registration garna parcha.

question: Nepal ma VAT ko dar kati cha?
question_ne: Nepal ma VAT ko dar kati cha?
question_en: What is the VAT rate in Nepal?
question_normalized: nepal ma vat ko dar kati cha
answer_ne: Nepal ma VAT ko single standard rate 13% cha. Kehi specific goods ra services ma exemption cha.
answer_en: Nepal has a single standard VAT rate of 13%. Some specific goods and services are exempt.
answer_short_ne: Nepal ma VAT ko single standard rate 13% cha.
common_followups: Kun saman ma VAT chhut cha?
VAT register garna kati turnover chahiyo?
related_questions: Kun saman ma VAT chhut cha?
VAT register garna kati turnover chahiyo?

question: VAT return kahile file garne?
question_ne: VAT return kahile file garne?
question_en: When to file VAT return?
question_normalized: vat return kahile file garne
answer_ne: VAT return har mahina ko 25 gate bhanda agadi file garera tax tirda huncha. Barsa ma 12 wata monthly return file garne parcha.
answer_en: VAT returns must be filed by the 25th of the following month. A total of 12 monthly returns must be filed per year.
answer_short_ne: VAT return har mahina ko 25 gate bhanda agadi file garera tax tirda huncha.
common_followups: VAT register garna kati turnover chahiyo?
Monthly return file nagare ke huncha?
related_questions: VAT register garna kati turnover chahiyo?
Monthly return file nagare ke huncha?

question: VAT refund kasari paune?
question_ne: VAT refund kasari paune?
question_en: How to get VAT refund?
question_normalized: vat refund kasari paune
answer_ne: Zero rated goods ko bikri athawa excess input tax bhayema VAT refund claim garna sakincha. Niyam anusar IRD ma niwedan gari refund pauna sakcha.
answer_en: VAT refund can be claimed for zero-rated goods sales or excess input tax. A claim application must be submitted to IRD as per rules.
answer_short_ne: Zero rated goods ko bikri athawa excess input tax bhayema VAT refund claim garna sakincha.

question: Input tax credit ke ho?
question_ne: Input tax credit ke ho?
question_en: What is input tax credit?
question_normalized: input tax credit ke ho
answer_ne: Business ko lagi kinmel garda tireko VAT lai bikri garda uthayeko VAT bata ghatayera net tax nikalna sakine wyawastha lai input tax credit bhanincha.
answer_en: Input tax credit is a mechanism that allows businesses to deduct the VAT paid on purchases from the VAT collected on sales to calculate net tax payable.
answer_short_ne: Business ko lagi kinmel garda tireko VAT lai bikri garda uthayeko VAT bata ghatayera net tax nikalna sakine wyawastha lai input tax credit bhanincha.
common_followups: Kohi pani saman kinna le credit pauncha?
related_questions: Kohi pani saman kinna le credit pauncha?

question: Nepal ma kun saman ma VAT chhut cha?
question_ne: Nepal ma kun saman ma VAT chhut cha?
question_en: Which goods are VAT exempt in Nepal?
question_normalized: nepal ma kun saman ma vat chhut cha
answer_ne: Krishna ko aadharbhut saman (chamal, pitho, dal), shikshya ra swasthya sewa, suwa ko saaman, kehi krishi upaj haru ma VAT chhut cha.
answer_en: VAT exemption applies to basic food items (rice, flour, lentils), education and health services, infant supplies, and certain agricultural products.
answer_short_ne: Krishna ko aadharbhut saman (chamal, pitho, dal), shikshya ra swasthya sewa, suwa ko saaman, kehi krishi upaj haru ma VAT chhut cha.
common_followups: Zero rate ra exempt ma ke farak cha?
related_questions: Zero rate ra exempt ma ke farak cha?

question: Nepal ma natural person ko income tax rate kati ho?
question_ne: Nepal ma natural person ko income tax rate kati ho?
question_en: What are the individual income tax slabs in Nepal?
question_normalized: nepal ma natural person ko income tax rate kati ho
answer_ne: FY 2080/81 ma yearly income Rs 500,000 samma 1% (natural person), 5 lakh dekhi 7 lakh samma 10%, 7 lakh dekhi 20 lakh samma 20%, 20 lakh dekhi 50 lakh samma 30% ra 50 lakh bhanda mathi 36% cha.
answer_en: For FY 2080/81, annual income up to 500k 1% (natural person), 500k-700k 10%, 700k-2M 20%, 2M-5M 30%, and above 5M 36%.
answer_short_ne: FY 2080/81 ma yearly income Rs 500,000 samma 1% (natural person), 5 lakh dekhi 7 lakh samma 10%, 7 lakh dekhi 20 lakh samma 20%, 20 lakh dekhi 50 lakh samma 30%
common_followups: Couple ko lagi slab ke ho?
related_questions: Couple ko lagi slab ke ho?

question: Nepal ma company lai corporate tax kati lagcha?
question_ne: Nepal ma company lai corporate tax kati lagcha?
question_en: What is the corporate tax rate in Nepal?
question_normalized: nepal ma company lai corporate tax kati lagcha
answer_ne: Normal business ko lagi 25% corporate tax lagcha. Banks ra financial institutions lai 30%, hydropower ra special industries lai 10-20% samma cha.
answer_en: The normal corporate tax rate is 25%. Banks and financial institutions pay 30%, while hydropower and special industries have rates ranging from 10-20%.
answer_short_ne: Normal business ko lagi 25% corporate tax lagcha.
common_followups: Micro/Small enterprise ko rate ke cha?
related_questions: Micro/Small enterprise ko rate ke cha?

question: TDS rate kati kati cha?
question_ne: TDS rate kati kati cha?
question_en: What are the TDS rates in Nepal?
question_normalized: tds rate kati kati cha
answer_ne: Interest ma 5%, dividend ma 5%, rent ma 10%, commission/meeting fee ma 15%, contract payment ma 1.5% TDS kataincha. Praya 15% rate general payment ma lagu huncha.
answer_en: TDS rates are 5% on interest, 5% on dividends, 10% on rent, 15% on commission/meeting fees, 1.5% on contract payments. Generally 15% applies to miscellaneous payments.
answer_short_ne: Interest ma 5%, dividend ma 5%, rent ma 10%, commission/meeting fee ma 15%, contract payment ma 1.

question: TDS ko raka deposit kahile garne?
question_ne: TDS ko raka deposit kahile garne?
question_en: When should TDS be deposited?
question_normalized: tds ko raka deposit kahile garne
answer_ne: TDS katayeko mahina ko aaudo mahina 25 gate bhanda agadi Revenue Account ma jamma garne garnu parcha.
answer_en: TDS deducted must be deposited into the Revenue Account by the 25th of the following month.
answer_short_ne: TDS katayeko mahina ko aaudo mahina 25 gate bhanda agadi Revenue Account ma jamma garne garnu parcha.

question: TDS return kahile file garne?
question_ne: TDS return kahile file garne?
question_en: When to file TDS return?
question_normalized: tds return kahile file garne
answer_ne: TDS return har mahina katayeko mahina aawadhi pachi 15 gate bhanda agadi file garna parcha. Barsa ko 12 wota return file garna parcha.
answer_en: TDS return must be filed by the 15th of the following month after the deduction month. 12 returns must be filed annually.
answer_short_ne: TDS return har mahina katayeko mahina aawadhi pachi 15 gate bhanda agadi file garna parcha.

question: Advance tax kati kishthama tirne?
question_ne: Advance tax kati kishthama tirne?
question_en: How many installments for advance tax?
question_normalized: advance tax kati kishthama tirne
answer_ne: Assessed income ko aadhar ma 40%, 30%, 30% ko dar le Poush end, Chaitra end, ra Ashad end ma advance tax tirna parcha.
answer_en: Advance tax is paid in three installments of 40%, 30%, 30% based on the assessed income by the end of Poush, Chaitra, and Ashad.
answer_short_ne: Assessed income ko aadhar ma 40%, 30%, 30% ko dar le Poush end, Chaitra end, ra Ashad end ma advance tax tirna parcha.
common_followups: Naya business le kati advance tax tirne?
Time ma tiriyena bhane ke huncha?
related_questions: Naya business le kati advance tax tirne?
Time ma tiriyena bhane ke huncha?

question: PAN card kasaile banauna parcha?
question_ne: PAN card kasaile banauna parcha?
question_en: Who needs a PAN card?
question_normalized: pan card kasaile banauna parcha
answer_ne: Taxable income bhaye darta huna sabai byakti ra sanstha lai PAN chaincha. Rs 500 jari kharcha tirera IRD bata PAN liya jana sakincha.
answer_en: All individuals and entities with taxable income must register for a PAN. It can be obtained from IRD by paying a registration fee of Rs 500.
answer_short_ne: Taxable income bhaye darta huna sabai byakti ra sanstha lai PAN chaincha.

question: Income tax return kahile file garne?
question_ne: Income tax return kahile file garne?
question_en: When to file income tax return?
question_normalized: income tax return kahile file garne
answer_ne: Vyaktigat income tax return Poush end samma (3 months extension) file garna milcha. Company le aafno year end ko 6 mahina bhanda dhilo garna hudaina.
answer_en: Personal income tax returns can be filed by the end of Poush (3 months extension). Companies must file within 6 months of their fiscal year end.
answer_short_ne: Vyaktigat income tax return Poush end samma (3 months extension) file garna milcha.

question: Nepal ma customs duty kati lagcha?
question_ne: Nepal ma customs duty kati lagcha?
question_en: What is the customs duty in Nepal?
question_normalized: nepal ma customs duty kati lagcha
answer_ne: Customs duty rates 0% dekhi 60% samma HS code anusar farak parcha. Aadharbhut khadya saman ma 5-15%, luxury ma 40%+, raw materials ma 1-10% dastoor lagcha.
answer_en: Customs duty rates vary from 0% to 60% based on HS codes. Basic food items 5-15%, luxury goods 40%+, raw materials 1-10% duty applies.
answer_short_ne: Customs duty rates 0% dekhi 60% samma HS code anusar farak parcha.
common_followups: HS code kaha bata thaha paune?
related_questions: HS code kaha bata thaha paune?

question: Excise duty kati lagcha?
question_ne: Excise duty kati lagcha?
question_en: What is the excise duty rate?
question_normalized: excise duty kati lagcha
answer_ne: Excise duty surti, madyapadarth, soft drinks, luxury items ra gadi ma lagcha. Rate ad valorem (%, e.g., 25-60%) athawa specific rate (per unit) ma huncha.
answer_en: Excise duty applies to tobacco, alcohol, soft drinks, luxury items, and vehicles. Rates are either ad valorem (%, e.g., 25-60%) or specific rates (per unit).
answer_short_ne: Excise duty surti, madyapadarth, soft drinks, luxury items ra gadi ma lagcha.
common_followups: Excise duty ko sworup ke ho?
related_questions: Excise duty ko sworup ke ho?

question: HS code ke ho?
question_ne: HS code ke ho?
question_en: What is HS code?
question_normalized: hs code ke ho
answer_ne: Harmonized System (HS) code biswabhar ma mannyata prapt saman ko classification system ho, jasle customs valuation ra duty determinate garcha.
answer_en: The Harmonized System (HS) code is a globally standardized classification system for goods that determines customs valuation and duty rates.
answer_short_ne: Harmonized System (HS) code biswabhar ma mannyata prapt saman ko classification system ho, jasle customs valuation ra duty determinate garcha.

question: Sampati kar kati tirne?
question_ne: Sampati kar kati tirne?
question_en: What is the property tax rate?
question_normalized: sampati kar kati tirne
answer_ne: Sthaniya sarkar (Gaupalika/Nagarpalika) le sampati ko prakar ra location adi anusar sampati kar nirdharan garcha. Dharauti mulya ya area aadhar ma progressive rate huncha.
answer_en: Local governments (Rural/Municipal) determine property tax based on property type and location. Progressive rates apply based on assessed value or area.
answer_short_ne: Sthaniya sarkar (Gaupalika/Nagarpalika) le sampati ko prakar ra location adi anusar sampati kar nirdharan garcha.

question: Gadi ko tax kati tirne?
question_ne: Gadi ko tax kati tirne?
question_en: What is the vehicle tax rate?
question_normalized: gadi ko tax kati tirne
answer_ne: Sawari sadhan kar engine capacity (CC) ra prakar anusar prabesh ma eak patak ra barshik navikaran garne gari staniya sarkar le rate nirdharan garcha.
answer_en: Vehicle tax is determined by the local government based on engine capacity (CC) and type, payable as a one-time entry tax and annual renewal.
answer_short_ne: Sawari sadhan kar engine capacity (CC) ra prakar anusar prabesh ma eak patak ra barshik navikaran garne gari staniya sarkar le rate nirdharan garcha.
common_followups: Purano gadi ko tax ke huncha?
related_questions: Purano gadi ko tax ke huncha?

question: Tax return dhila file garda kati penalty?
question_ne: Tax return dhila file garda kati penalty?
question_en: What is the penalty for late tax filing?
question_normalized: tax return dhila file garda kati penalty
answer_ne: File nagarema Income Tax Act anushar 0.01% to 0.05% per day late fee, plus Rs 5,000 prabarsa samma extra penalty huna sakcha. VAT ma per return Rs 2000 dekhi Rs 8000 penalty cha.
answer_en: Under the Income Tax Act, late fees range from 0.01% to 0.05% per day, plus up to Rs 5,000 extra penalty per instance. VAT penalties range from Rs 2,000 to Rs 8,000 per return.
answer_short_ne: File nagarema Income Tax Act anushar 0.

question: Micro business ko tax rate kati cha?
question_ne: Micro business ko tax rate kati cha?
question_en: What is the tax rate for micro businesses?
question_normalized: micro business ko tax rate kati cha
answer_ne: Classification anusar micro, small ra medium enterprises lai kehi sarsahuliyat cha. Nepal ma Micro (10 lakh samma capital) ra Small business ko lagi certain income threshold ma 0.75% ya turnover based tax lagcha.
answer_en: Micro (capital up to 10 lakh) and small enterprises enjoy concessions. Certain thresholds allow for a 0.75% turnover-based tax or prescribed slab rates.
answer_short_ne: Classification anusar micro, small ra medium enterprises lai kehi sarsahuliyat cha.
legal_reference: Industrial Enterprises Act 2076, Income Tax Act

question: Tax clearance certificate kasari paune?
question_ne: Tax clearance certificate kasari paune?
question_en: How to get a tax clearance certificate?
question_normalized: tax clearance certificate kasari paune
answer_ne: Sabai tax details updated gari, audit report (company ko lagi) ra applicable documents submit garera IRD ko online system bata niwedan dine.
answer_en: Submit an application via IRD's online system with all tax details updated, audit report (for companies), and applicable documents.
answer_short_ne: Sabai tax details updated gari, audit report (company ko lagi) ra applicable documents submit garera IRD ko online system bata niwedan dine.

question: Rent ma TDS kati katne?
question_ne: Rent ma TDS kati katne?
question_en: What is TDS on rent?
question_normalized: rent ma tds kati katne
answer_ne: Basobas arthath ghar bhada ma 10% TDS katni parcha. Byawasayik prayojan ko lagi tireko bhadai ma 10% TDS kataincha.
answer_en: 10% TDS must be deducted on residential house rent. 10% TDS is also deducted on rent paid for business purposes.
answer_short_ne: Basobas arthath ghar bhada ma 10% TDS katni parcha.
common_followups: Ghar dhani lai TDS dina parcha?
related_questions: Ghar dhani lai TDS dina parcha?

question: Interest income ma TDS kati katne?
question_ne: Interest income ma TDS kati katne?
question_en: What is TDS on interest income?
question_normalized: interest income ma tds kati katne
answer_ne: Nepal ma bank ko nikshep ra debenture ma 5% TDS kataincha. Anya byakti bata liyeko rin ko interest ma 15% TDS lagcha.
answer_en: TDS of 5% applies to bank deposits and debentures. Interest on loans from other individuals attracts 15% TDS.
answer_short_ne: Nepal ma bank ko nikshep ra debenture ma 5% TDS kataincha.

question: Income tax ma medical kharcha credit kati pauncha?
question_ne: Income tax ma medical kharcha credit kati pauncha?
question_en: What is the medical tax credit limit?
question_normalized: income tax ma medical kharcha credit kati pauncha
answer_ne: Byakti le chikitsha kharach bapat 15% athawa adhikatam Rs 750 prabarsa samma credit pauna sakne byawastha cha.
answer_en: Individuals can claim a medical tax credit of up to 15% of the expense or a maximum of Rs 750 per year.
answer_short_ne: Byakti le chikitsha kharach bapat 15% athawa adhikatam Rs 750 prabarsa samma credit pauna sakne byawastha cha.

question: Durgam kshetra ma tax chhut ke cha?
question_ne: Durgam kshetra ma tax chhut ke cha?
question_en: What is the tax benefit for remote areas?
question_normalized: durgam kshetra ma tax chhut ke cha
answer_ne: Durgam kshetra ma karyarat karmachari lai 20% dekhi 50% samma tax exemption cha. Company lai pani certain areas ma 20% dekhi 50% samma discount cha.
answer_en: Employees working in remote areas get 20% to 50% tax exemption. Companies also receive 20% to 50% tax discounts in certain designated areas.
answer_short_ne: Durgam kshetra ma karyarat karmachari lai 20% dekhi 50% samma tax exemption cha.

question: Export ma tax lagcha ki nai?
question_ne: Export ma tax lagcha ki nai?
question_en: Is there tax on exports?
question_normalized: export ma tax lagcha ki nai
answer_ne: Export ma customs duty lagdaina (Zero rated). VAT ko lagi pani zero rate hunale input tax credit refund garna milcha.
answer_en: Exports are zero-rated for customs duty. For VAT, it is also zero-rated, allowing a refund of input tax credits.
answer_short_ne: Export ma customs duty lagdaina (Zero rated).

question: Professional tax ke ho?
question_ne: Professional tax ke ho?
question_en: What is professional tax?
question_normalized: professional tax ke ho
answer_ne: Sthaniya sarkar le doctor, engineer, lawyer, auditor jasta pesagat byakti lai barshik swikriti kar (professional tax) lagau garna sakcha.
answer_en: Local governments can levy an annual license tax (professional tax) on professionals such as doctors, engineers, lawyers, and auditors.
answer_short_ne: Sthaniya sarkar le doctor, engineer, lawyer, auditor jasta pesagat byakti lai barshik swikriti kar (professional tax) lagau garna sakcha.

question: Capital gains tax kati lagcha?
question_ne: Capital gains tax kati lagcha?
question_en: What is the capital gains tax rate?
question_normalized: capital gains tax kati lagcha
answer_ne: Sampati/security bikri garda natural person lai 5% (fixed deposit) ra listed shares ma 5%/7.5% (individual/institutional) lagcha. Jagga ma 5% dekhi 10% samma cha.
answer_en: Natural persons pay 5% on fixed deposit gains, and 5%/7.5% on listed shares (individual/institutional). Land sales attract 5% to 10%.
answer_short_ne: Sampati/security bikri garda natural person lai 5% (fixed deposit) ra listed shares ma 5%/7.
common_followups: Short term ra long term rate ke ho?
related_questions: Short term ra long term rate ke ho?

question: Online business lai tax ke cha?
question_ne: Online business lai tax ke cha?
question_en: What is the tax for e-commerce?
question_normalized: online business lai tax ke cha
answer_ne: E-commerce business lai pani normal business jastai income tax ra VAT lagcha. Foreign entity le digital service provide garda 2% turnover tax (VAT) lagcha.
answer_en: E-commerce businesses are subject to normal income tax and VAT. Foreign entities providing digital services face a 2% turnover tax (VAT).
answer_short_ne: E-commerce business lai pani normal business jastai income tax ra VAT lagcha.

question: Gift tax Nepal ma lagcha?
question_ne: Gift tax Nepal ma lagcha?
question_en: Is there gift tax in Nepal?
question_normalized: gift tax nepal ma lagcha
answer_ne: Kehi paristhiti ma gift amount lai income manine byabastha cha. Afanta bata property transfer ma nalagepani unnatural/undue influence bhayema tax lagcha.
answer_en: In some circumstances, gift amounts can be treated as income. While family property transfers may be exempt, unnatural transfers may attract tax.
answer_short_ne: Kehi paristhiti ma gift amount lai income manine byabastha cha.
common_followups: Close family ko list ke cha?
related_questions: Close family ko list ke cha?

question: NGO lai tax lagcha ki nai?
question_ne: NGO lai tax lagcha ki nai?
question_en: Are NGOs taxed in Nepal?
question_normalized: ngo lai tax lagcha ki nai
answer_ne: NGO lai certain conditions pura bhaye income tax chhut huncha. Tara PAN line, audit garne ra return file garne daayitwa huncha. VAT ma chai 13% lagcha.
answer_en: NGOs can get income tax exemption if they meet certain conditions. However, they must obtain PAN, conduct audits, and file returns. VAT at 13% applies.
answer_short_ne: NGO lai certain conditions pura bhaye income tax chhut huncha.

question: Byawasayik gadi ko tax ke ho?
question_ne: Byawasayik gadi ko tax ke ho?
question_en: What is the tax for business vehicles?
question_normalized: byawasayik gadi ko tax ke ho
answer_ne: Company le gadi leaunda customs, excise ra VAT tirna parcha. Barseni staniya sarkar lai sawari kar tire pani byawasaya ko kharcha ma dekhai tax ghatayera faida lina sakcha.
answer_en: Companies must pay customs, excise, and VAT when purchasing vehicles. Annual local vehicle tax can be shown as business expenses, reducing taxable income.
answer_short_ne: Company le gadi leaunda customs, excise ra VAT tirna parcha.
legal_reference: Income Tax Act, Local Govt Act

question: Pension ma income tax lagcha?
question_ne: Pension ma income tax lagcha?
question_en: Is pension taxable in Nepal?
question_normalized: pension ma income tax lagcha
answer_ne: Sarkari nijamati ra sangathit sector ko pension ma 25% exemption pachi bakhi rakam ma slab anusar tax lagcha. Deposit based pension yojana ma kehi suwidha cha.
answer_en: Government, civil service, and organized sector pensions get a 25% exemption, and the remaining amount is taxed as per slabs. Deposit-based pension schemes have some benefits.
answer_short_ne: Sarkari nijamati ra sangathit sector ko pension ma 25% exemption pachi bakhi rakam ma slab anusar tax lagcha.

question: TDS na kate ke huncha?
question_ne: TDS na kate ke huncha?
question_en: What happens if TDS is not deducted?
question_normalized: tds na kate ke huncha
answer_ne: TDS na kateko rakam, 15% interest ra total amount ko 20% penalty tirai dine dayitwa huncha, katai nakatayeko apradh maninchha.
answer_en: The undeducted TDS amount, plus 15% interest and a 20% penalty on the total amount, must be paid. It is treated as an offense.
answer_short_ne: TDS na kateko rakam, 15% interest ra total amount ko 20% penalty tirai dine dayitwa huncha, katai nakatayeko apradh maninchha.

question: Tax resident kasaile manincha?
question_ne: Tax resident kasaile manincha?
question_en: Who is considered a tax resident?
question_normalized: tax resident kasaile manincha
answer_ne: Aay barsa ma 183 din Nepal ma basne byakti athawa Nepal bata income ko source bhako byakti lai tax resident manincha.
answer_en: An individual staying in Nepal for 183 days in an income year or having a source of income in Nepal is considered a tax resident.
answer_short_ne: Aay barsa ma 183 din Nepal ma basne byakti athawa Nepal bata income ko source bhako byakti lai tax resident manincha.

question: Digital service provider lai tax ke cha?
question_ne: Digital service provider lai tax ke cha?
question_en: What is the tax for digital service providers?
question_normalized: digital service provider lai tax ke cha
answer_ne: Non-resident digital service provider lai 2% turnover based tax (VAT) registration garera quarterly return file garne byabastha cha.
answer_en: Non-resident digital service providers must register for a 2% turnover-based tax (VAT) and file quarterly returns.
answer_short_ne: Non-resident digital service provider lai 2% turnover based tax (VAT) registration garera quarterly return file garne byabastha cha.

question: Sahakari sanstha ko tax rate ke ho?
question_ne: Sahakari sanstha ko tax rate ke ho?
question_en: What is the tax rate for cooperatives?
question_normalized: sahakari sanstha ko tax rate ke ho
answer_ne: Bachat ra rin sahakari lai kehi limit samma tax chut huncha. General cooperative lai 25% ra special sectors lai 20% corporate tax lagcha.
answer_en: Savings and loan cooperatives get tax exemptions up to certain limits. General cooperatives pay 25% and special sectors pay 20% corporate tax.
answer_short_ne: Bachat ra rin sahakari lai kehi limit samma tax chut huncha.

question: Nepal ma Inheritance tax lagcha?
question_ne: Nepal ma Inheritance tax lagcha?
question_en: Is there inheritance tax in Nepal?
question_normalized: nepal ma inheritance tax lagcha
answer_ne: Nepal ma aanshik aakar ma pani Inheritance/Estate tax lagu chaina. Tara sampati transfer garda capital gains tax ra registration fee lagcha.
answer_en: Nepal does not have Inheritance/Estate tax in any form. However, property transfer involves capital gains tax and registration fees.
answer_short_ne: Nepal ma aanshik aakar ma pani Inheritance/Estate tax lagu chaina.
legal_reference: Income Tax Act, Muluki Dewani Samhita

question: Share market ma tax kati ho?
question_ne: Share market ma tax kati ho?
question_en: What is the tax on share transactions?
question_normalized: share market ma tax kati ho
answer_ne: Dharauti saraah bikri garda 0.015% sebi tax lagcha. Capital gains ma natural person lai 5% ya 7.5% income tax cha.
answer_en: SEBI tax of 0.015% applies on share collateral sales. Capital gains tax of 5% or 7.5% applies to natural persons.
answer_short_ne: Dharauti saraah bikri garda 0.

question: Electric gadi ko tax ke cha?
question_ne: Electric gadi ko tax ke cha?
question_en: What is the tax on electric vehicles?
question_normalized: electric gadi ko tax ke cha
answer_ne: Electric gadi ko customs duty 10% matra cha ra excise pani chhut gariyeko cha. 40-50% tax suwidha cha petrol gadi bhanda.
answer_en: Customs duty on electric vehicles is only 10%, and excise is exempted. There is a 40-50% tax benefit compared to petrol vehicles.
answer_short_ne: Electric gadi ko customs duty 10% matra cha ra excise pani chhut gariyeko cha.

answer_ne: Thekedari bhukhtani ma 1.5% TDS kataincha. Tenant/consultant lai 15%, mechanic lai 10% TDS lagu huncha.
answer_en: 1.5% TDS is deducted on contract payments. 15% applies to tenants/consultants and 10% to mechanics.
answer_short_ne: Thekedari bhukhtani ma 1.

question: Nepal ma foreign investment lai ke tax cha?
question_ne: Nepal ma foreign investment lai ke tax cha?
question_en: What is the tax on foreign investment?
question_normalized: nepal ma foreign investment lai ke tax cha
answer_ne: Foreign investment lai Nepal ma normal tax lagcha. 50% had samma foreign loan ko interest (thin cap rule) capital manincha ra tax lagcha.
answer_en: Normal tax applies to foreign investment in Nepal. Under thin capitalization rules, up to 50% of foreign loan interest can be treated as capital and taxed.
answer_short_ne: Foreign investment lai Nepal ma normal tax lagcha.
common_followups: Profit repatriate garda tax ke cha?
related_questions: Profit repatriate garda tax ke cha?

question: Krishi income ma tax lagcha?
question_ne: Krishi income ma tax lagcha?
question_en: Is agricultural income taxable?
question_normalized: krishi income ma tax lagcha
answer_ne: Vyaktigat krishi aaya kar mukt cha. Tara company dwara garine commercial farming ra tea estate ma normal tax lagcha.
answer_en: Personal agricultural income is tax-exempt. However, commercial farming and tea estates operated by companies are subject to normal tax.
answer_short_ne: Vyaktigat krishi aaya kar mukt cha.

question: Insurance premium ma tax credit pauncha?
question_ne: Insurance premium ma tax credit pauncha?
question_en: Is there a tax credit on insurance premiums?
question_normalized: insurance premium ma tax credit pauncha
answer_ne: Jeevan bima premium ko 40% athawa adhikatam Rs 25,000 prabarsa income tax credit pauncha. Swasthya bima ma pani similar suwidha cha.
answer_en: A tax credit of 40% of the life insurance premium or a maximum of Rs 25,000 per year is available. Similar benefits apply to health insurance.
answer_short_ne: Jeevan bima premium ko 40% athawa adhikatam Rs 25,000 prabarsa income tax credit pauncha.

question: Tax officer le dhamki diyo bhane?
question_ne: Tax officer le dhamki diyo bhane?
question_en: What if a tax officer threatens?
question_normalized: tax officer le dhamki diyo bhane
answer_ne: Tax officer le manomanni garda Department ya Revenue Board ma ujoor garna paaincha. Tax audit unfair bhayema admin review ma jana sakincha.
answer_en: If a tax officer acts arbitrarily, complaints can be filed with the Department or Revenue Board. Unfair tax audits can be taken up for administrative review.
answer_short_ne: Tax officer le manomanni garda Department ya Revenue Board ma ujoor garna paaincha.
legal_reference: Income Tax Act 2058, Right to information

question: DTAA Nepal ko sanga sanga cha?
question_ne: DTAA Nepal ko sanga sanga cha?
question_en: DTAA is with which countries?
question_normalized: dtaa nepal ko sanga sanga cha
answer_ne: Nepal le 11 desh sanga DTAA gareko cha. Jastai India, China, Qatar ra South Korea. Bank interest 5-15% dependent ma reduce bhayeko cha.
answer_en: Nepal has DTAA with 11 countries, including India, China, Qatar, and South Korea. Bank interest is reduced to 5-15% dependent on the agreement.
answer_short_ne: Nepal le 11 desh sanga DTAA gareko cha.

question: VAT reconciliation ke ho?
question_ne: VAT reconciliation ke ho?
question_en: What is VAT reconciliation?
question_normalized: vat reconciliation ke ho
answer_ne: Bikri ra khata bahi anusar file gareko VAT return milan garne kaam reconciliation ho. Barsa bhari 12 wota return ra audit report milan anibaraya cha.
answer_en: VAT reconciliation is matching filed VAT returns with sales and account books. Matching 12 monthly returns with the audit report is mandatory.
answer_short_ne: Bikri ra khata bahi anusar file gareko VAT return milan garne kaam reconciliation ho.

question: Tax audit report kasko chaine?
question_ne: Tax audit report kasko chaine?
question_en: Who needs a tax audit report?
question_normalized: tax audit report kasko chaine
answer_ne: Company ra certain limit bhanda mathi turnover bhayeko byawasaya lai income tax ra VAT audit report IRD ma file garna parcha.
answer_en: Companies and businesses exceeding a certain turnover limit must file income tax and VAT audit reports with IRD.
answer_short_ne: Company ra certain limit bhanda mathi turnover bhayeko byawasaya lai income tax ra VAT audit report IRD ma file garna parcha.

question: Naksha pass bina ghar ko tax kati?
question_ne: Naksha pass bina ghar ko tax kati?
question_en: What is the tax for houses without map approval?
question_normalized: naksha pass bina ghar ko tax kati
answer_ne: Naksha pass nabhai baneko ghar lai staniya sarkar le 25% dekhi 50% samma extra sampati kar lagau garna sakcha.
answer_en: Local governments can impose an additional 25% to 50% property tax on houses built without map approval.
answer_short_ne: Naksha pass nabhai baneko ghar lai staniya sarkar le 25% dekhi 50% samma extra sampati kar lagau garna sakcha.

question: Royalty ma tax kati lagcha?
question_ne: Royalty ma tax kati lagcha?
question_en: What is the tax on royalty?
question_normalized: royalty ma tax kati lagcha
answer_ne: Non-resident lai tireko royalty ma 15% final withholding tax lagcha (DTAA dependent). Resident lai normal income tax nai lagcha.
answer_en: A 15% final withholding tax applies to royalties paid to non-residents (DTAA dependent). Residents are subject to normal income tax.
answer_short_ne: Non-resident lai tireko royalty ma 15% final withholding tax lagcha (DTAA dependent).

question: Tax payment kasari garne?
question_ne: Tax payment kasari garne?
question_en: How to pay taxes?
question_normalized: tax payment kasari garne
answer_ne: IRD bata generate gareko PAN based Revenue Receipts (PRN) prayog gari online banking, eSewa, athawa bank counter bata tirna sakincha.
answer_en: Taxes can be paid via online banking, eSewa, or bank counters using PAN-based Revenue Receipts (PRN) generated from IRD.
answer_short_ne: IRD bata generate gareko PAN based Revenue Receipts (PRN) prayog gari online banking, eSewa, athawa bank counter bata tirna sakincha.

question: Investment ma ke tax chhut cha?
question_ne: Investment ma ke tax chhut cha?
question_en: What tax incentives exist for investment?
question_normalized: investment ma ke tax chhut cha
answer_ne: Hydropower, manufacturing, infrastructure ra tourism ma 5-10 barsa samma tax holiday pauna sakcha. 100% depreciation pani suwidha cha.
answer_en: Tax holidays of 5-10 years are available for hydropower, manufacturing, infrastructure, and tourism. 100% depreciation benefits also exist.
answer_short_ne: Hydropower, manufacturing, infrastructure ra tourism ma 5-10 barsa samma tax holiday pauna sakcha.
common_followups: Special Economic Zone ma k huncha?
related_questions: Special Economic Zone ma k huncha?

question: Non-resident lai Nepal ma tax kati lagcha?
question_ne: Non-resident lai Nepal ma tax kati lagcha?
question_en: What is the tax rate for non-residents?
question_normalized: non-resident lai nepal ma tax kati lagcha
answer_ne: Non-resident lai Nepal srot ko income ma 25% samma withholding tax lagcha. Certain service ma 15% ra 5% pani lagcha.
answer_en: Non-residents pay up to 25% withholding tax on income sourced in Nepal. Certain services attract 15% and 5%.
answer_short_ne: Non-resident lai Nepal srot ko income ma 25% samma withholding tax lagcha.

question: Jagga bechda tax kati lagcha?
question_ne: Jagga bechda tax kati lagcha?
question_en: What is the tax on land sales?
question_normalized: jagga bechda tax kati lagcha
answer_ne: Vyaktigat jagga bikri garda dharauti mulya ka aadhar ma 5% dekhi 10% samma capital gains tax lagcha. Holding period anusar exemptions cha.
answer_en: Individual land sales attract 5% to 10% capital gains tax based on the assessed value. Exemptions exist based on the holding period.
answer_short_ne: Vyaktigat jagga bikri garda dharauti mulya ka aadhar ma 5% dekhi 10% samma capital gains tax lagcha.
legal_reference: Income Tax Act 2058, Land Revenue Act

question: Dividend ma tax kati katne?
question_ne: Dividend ma tax kati katne?
question_en: What is the tax on dividends?
question_normalized: dividend ma tax kati katne
answer_ne: Company le dividend bhand garda 5% withholding tax kataincha. Byakti ma aaipugda final tax treatment huncha.
answer_en: Companies withhold a 5% tax when distributing dividends. This is treated as final tax for individuals.
answer_short_ne: Company le dividend bhand garda 5% withholding tax kataincha.

question: Pasalko tax kati tirne?
question_ne: Pasalko tax kati tirne?
question_en: What is the local business tax?

answer_ne: Sthaniya sarkar le byawasaya ko prakar anusar bersik byawasaya kar (business tax) nirdharan garcha, jo pachhi sampati kar sangai tirna parcha.
answer_en: Local governments determine annual business tax based on the type of business, which must be paid along with property tax.
answer_short_ne: Sthaniya sarkar le byawasaya ko prakar anusar bersik byawasaya kar (business tax) nirdharan garcha, jo pachhi sampati kar sangai tirna parcha.

question: Bidesh ko interest income ma tax?

question_en: Is foreign interest income taxable?

answer_ne: Nepal ma basne tax resident le bidesh ko bank interest income dekhayema foreign tax credit claim garna sakcha, tara Nepal ma pani tax dina sakcha.
answer_en: Nepal resident tax residents declaring foreign bank interest can claim foreign tax credits, but tax may also be due in Nepal.

question: Turnover tax ke ho?
question_ne: Turnover tax ke ho?
question_en: What is turnover tax?

answer_ne: Small taxpayers lai Rs 1 lakh samma chhut, 1L-2.5L ma 0.25%, 2.5L-5L ma 0.5%, 5L-10L ma 1.5% samma turnover tax tirne suwidha cha.
answer_en: Small taxpayers have turnover tax benefits: up to Rs 1L exempt, 1L-2.5L 0.25%, 2.5L-5L 0.5%, 5L-10L up to 1.5%.
answer_short_ne: Small taxpayers lai Rs 1 lakh samma chhut, 1L-2.

question: Hotel lai tax ke cha?
question_ne: Hotel lai tax ke cha?
question_en: What is the tax for hotels?
question_normalized: hotel lai tax ke cha
answer_ne: Hotel lai normal 25% corporate tax lagcha, tara tourist standard ko hotel le 20% tirna paune suwidha cha. VAT 13% ra sewa soolka pani cha.
answer_en: Normal 25% corporate tax applies, but tourist-standard hotels benefit from a 20% rate. VAT 13% and service charges also apply.
answer_short_ne: Hotel lai normal 25% corporate tax lagcha, tara tourist standard ko hotel le 20% tirna paune suwidha cha.

question: School ko income ma tax lagcha?
question_ne: School ko income ma tax lagcha?
question_en: Is school income taxable?
question_normalized: school ko income ma tax lagcha
answer_ne: Sarkari school ko income tax exempt cha. Private school chai company saraha 25% income tax ra VAT (educational service ma chhut) bujhaunu parcha.
answer_en: Government school income is tax-exempt. Private schools must pay 25% income tax like companies and VAT (educational services are exempt).
answer_short_ne: Sarkari school ko income tax exempt cha.

question: PE concept Nepal ma ke ho?
question_ne: PE concept Nepal ma ke ho?
question_en: What is the PE concept in Nepal?
question_normalized: pe concept nepal ma ke ho
answer_ne: Foreign company ko Nepal ma fixed base bhaye PE kaim garincha ra Nepal ma bhako income/asset ma tax tirna parcha.
answer_en: A PE is established if a foreign company has a fixed base in Nepal, making income/assets in Nepal taxable.
answer_short_ne: Foreign company ko Nepal ma fixed base bhaye PE kaim garincha ra Nepal ma bhako income/asset ma tax tirna parcha.

question: Assessable income ke ho?
question_ne: Assessable income ke ho?
question_en: What is assessable income?
question_normalized: assessable income ke ho
answer_ne: Business profit, salary, house rent, investment return sabai jodera prasashkiya kharcha ghatayera aauda aako rakam assessable income ho.
answer_en: Assessable income is the total of business profit, salary, house rent, and investment returns after deducting administrative expenses.
answer_short_ne: Business profit, salary, house rent, investment return sabai jodera prasashkiya kharcha ghatayera aauda aako rakam assessable income ho.

question: E-TDS file nagare ke huncha?
question_ne: E-TDS file nagare ke huncha?
question_en: What is the penalty for not filing E-TDS?
question_normalized: e-tds file nagare ke huncha
answer_ne: E-TDS return file nagare Rs 50,000 samma penalty ra lagat ko byabstha cha. Mahina ko 15 gate pachi daily late fee lagcha.
answer_en: A penalty of up to Rs 50,000 and daily late fees apply if the E-TDS return is not filed after the 15th of the month.
answer_short_ne: E-TDS return file nagare Rs 50,000 samma penalty ra lagat ko byabstha cha.

question: Cryptocurrency ma tax lagcha?
question_ne: Cryptocurrency ma tax lagcha?
question_en: Is cryptocurrency taxed?
question_normalized: cryptocurrency ma tax lagcha
answer_ne: Nepal ma cryptocurrency karobar awaidha cha, ra jabardast kar hataune jariwana sahit sambhawit kar darkar cha.
answer_en: Cryptocurrency trading is illegal in Nepal and carries severe penalties including potential confiscation, though tax implications apply if income is detected.
answer_short_ne: Nepal ma cryptocurrency karobar awaidha cha, ra jabardast kar hataune jariwana sahit sambhawit kar darkar cha.

question: Bank guarantee ma tax cha?
question_ne: Bank guarantee ma tax cha?
question_en: Is there tax on bank guarantees?
question_normalized: bank guarantee ma tax cha
answer_ne: Bank guarantee charge income le bank lai tax liability dincha. Grahak le tirne guarantee fee ma 15% TDS kataincha.
answer_en: Bank guarantee charge income creates tax liability for the bank. The guarantee fee paid by the customer is subject to 15% TDS.
answer_short_ne: Bank guarantee charge income le bank lai tax liability dincha.

question: VAT registration kasari garne?
question_ne: VAT registration kasari garne?
question_en: How to register for VAT?
question_normalized: vat registration kasari garne
answer_ne: IRD ko online portal bari nivedan garda PAN, sthaniya sarkar ko darta, ra byawasaya sthala ko details sahita file garda VAT darta huncha.
answer_en: Apply via the IRD online portal with PAN, local government registration, and business premise details to obtain VAT registration.
answer_short_ne: IRD ko online portal bari nivedan garda PAN, sthaniya sarkar ko darta, ra byawasaya sthala ko details sahita file garda VAT darta huncha.

question: Retirement fund (EPF/SSF) ma tax?
question_ne: Retirement fund (EPF/SSF) ma tax?
question_en: Is retirement fund (EPF/SSF) taxed?
question_normalized: retirement fund (epf/ssf) ma tax
answer_ne: Yogdan garda 1% social security tax lagcha. Nikalda 5% TDS katine byabastha cha, tara 25% exemption suwidha cha.
answer_en: A 1% social security tax applies on contribution. On withdrawal, 5% TDS applies, but a 25% exemption benefit is available.
answer_short_ne: Yogdan garda 1% social security tax lagcha.

question: Transfer pricing ke ho?
question_ne: Transfer pricing ke ho?
question_en: What is transfer pricing?
question_normalized: transfer pricing ke ho
answer_ne: Sambandhit pakshya bich transactions ma arm's length price kayam garna parcha. Nabhaye tax officer le adjustment garne adhikar rakhcha.
answer_en: Transactions between associated parties must be at arm's length price. Otherwise, the tax officer has the right to make adjustments.
answer_short_ne: Sambandhit pakshya bich transactions ma arm's length price kayam garna parcha.

question: Tax order ma chitta nabujhe ke garne?
question_ne: Tax order ma chitta nabujhe ke garne?
question_en: What to do if unsatisfied with a tax order?
question_normalized: tax order ma chitta nabujhe ke garne
answer_ne: Tax officer ko nirnaya birudh 30 din bhitra administrative review, tespachhi Revenue Tribunal ma appeal garna sakincha.
answer_en: An administrative review can be filed within 30 days against a tax officer's decision, followed by an appeal to the Revenue Tribunal.
answer_short_ne: Tax officer ko nirnaya birudh 30 din bhitra administrative review, tespachhi Revenue Tribunal ma appeal garna sakincha.
legal_reference: Income Tax Act 2058, Revenue Tribunal Act

question: Business bechda tax ke huncha?
question_ne: Business bechda tax ke huncha?
question_en: What is the tax on selling a business?
question_normalized: business bechda tax ke huncha
answer_ne: Slump sale ya itemized sale anusar capital gains tax lagcha. Assets ko valuation anusar 5% dekhi 25% samma effective tax lagcha.
answer_en: Capital gains tax applies on slump sale or itemized sale, with an effective rate of 5% to 25% based on asset valuation.
answer_short_ne: Slump sale ya itemized sale anusar capital gains tax lagcha.

question: Nijji gadi import ma kati tax?
question_ne: Nijji gadi import ma kati tax?
question_en: What is the tax on private vehicle imports?
question_normalized: nijji gadi import ma kati tax
answer_ne: Petrol/Diesel gadi ma 60% dekhi 300% samma customs, excise, ra VAT lagera kul tax 200%+ pugcha.
answer_en: For petrol/diesel vehicles, customs, excise, and VAT range from 60% to 300%, bringing total taxes to 200%+.
answer_short_ne: Petrol/Diesel gadi ma 60% dekhi 300% samma customs, excise, ra VAT lagera kul tax 200%+ pugcha.

question: Kitab ra stationary ma tax cha?
question_ne: Kitab ra stationary ma tax cha?
question_en: Is there tax on books and stationery?
question_normalized: kitab ra stationary ma tax cha
answer_ne: Kitab ma VAT chhut cha, stationary ma 13% VAT lagcha. Import ma kitab duty-free, stationary ma 5-15% duty cha.
answer_en: VAT is exempt on books, while stationery attracts 13% VAT. Book imports are duty-free; stationery imports have 5-15% duty.
answer_short_ne: Kitab ma VAT chhut cha, stationary ma 13% VAT lagcha.

question: Rent income ma tax kati lagcha?
question_ne: Rent income ma tax kati lagcha?
question_en: What is the tax on rental income?
question_normalized: rent income ma tax kati lagcha
answer_ne: Byakti lai rent income ma salary jastai slab anusar tax lagcha. Company lai 25% lagcha. 10% TDS credit lincha.
answer_en: Individuals are taxed on rental income as per slabs, similar to salary. Companies pay 25%. 10% TDS credit is taken.
answer_short_ne: Byakti lai rent income ma salary jastai slab anusar tax lagcha.

question_normalized: lottery ra gift ma tax cha
answer_ne: Lottery ma 25% final withholding tax lagcha. Gift ma unnatural transaction bhaye income manine byabastha cha.

question: Bidesh jada airport tax kati?
question_ne: Bidesh jada airport tax kati?
question_en: What is the airport tax for foreign travel?
question_normalized: bidesh jada airport tax kati
answer_ne: Bidesh jada TIA bata Rs 2,500 (SAARC) ra Rs 3,500 (Anya) barshik sewa soolka tireko huna parcha, jaslai tourism service fee pani bhanincha.

question: Share bechda kati tax lagcha?

answer_short_ne: Listed shares ma natural person lai 5% ra institutional lai 7.

question: Hydropower project lai ke tax chhut cha?
question_ne: Hydropower project lai ke tax chhut cha?

answer_ne: Hydropower lai 10 barsa samma income tax chhut, 1% turnover tax tirna suwidha, ra construction period ma VAT exemption jasta suwidha chan.

question: Medical equipment ma tax cha?

question: Excavator, crane ma tax kati ho?

answer_ne: Excavator, crane ma 5% customs duty ra 13% VAT lagcha. Construction work ma prayog hune ho bhane depreciation 20% pauncha.
answer_en: Excavators and cranes face 5% customs duty and 13% VAT. If used for construction work, 20% depreciation is available.
answer_short_ne: Excavator, crane ma 5% customs duty ra 13% VAT lagcha.

question: Surti janaya padartha ma tax kati ho?
question_ne: Surti janaya padartha ma tax kati ho?
question_en: What is the tax on tobacco products?
question_normalized: surti janaya padartha ma tax kati ho
answer_ne: Churot ma 60% customs, 30% excise, 13% VAT. Bidi ra surti ma specific excise rate cha.
answer_en: Cigarettes attract 60% customs, 30% excise, and 13% VAT. Bidi and chewing tobacco have specific excise rates.
answer_short_ne: Churot ma 60% customs, 30% excise, 13% VAT.

question: Ghar bechda tax kati lagcha?
question_ne: Ghar bechda tax kati lagcha?
question_en: What is the tax on selling a house?
question_normalized: ghar bechda tax kati lagcha
answer_ne: Ghar jagga bikri ma 5%-10% samma capital gains tax lagcha. Owner occupier lai 2 barsa bhanda purano bhaye chhut cha.

legal_reference: Income Tax Act, Land Revenue Act

question: Advertisement ma tax kati lagcha?
question_ne: Advertisement ma tax kati lagcha?
question_en: What is the tax on advertisements?
question_normalized: advertisement ma tax kati lagcha
answer_ne: Vigyapan service ma 15% TDS ra 13% VAT lagcha. Hoarding, newspaper, radio sabai ma lagu huncha.
answer_en: 15% TDS and 13% VAT apply to advertisement services across hoardings, newspapers, and radio.
answer_short_ne: Vigyapan service ma 15% TDS ra 13% VAT lagcha.

question: Motorcycle import ma kati tax?
question_ne: Motorcycle import ma kati tax?
question_en: What is the tax on motorcycle imports?
question_normalized: motorcycle import ma kati tax
answer_ne: Motorcycle import ma 40% dekhi 60% customs, 13% VAT ra 20% excise lagcha. Engine capacity 225cc samma ma kehi chhut cha.
answer_en: Motorcycle imports face 40% to 60% customs, 13% VAT, and 20% excise. Some exemption exists for engine capacities up to 225cc.
answer_short_ne: Motorcycle import ma 40% dekhi 60% customs, 13% VAT ra 20% excise lagcha.
common_followups: Electric scooter ko tax ke cha?
related_questions: Electric scooter ko tax ke cha?

question: Freelance income ma tax kati ho?
question_ne: Freelance income ma tax kati ho?
question_en: What is the tax on freelance income?
question_normalized: freelance income ma tax kati ho
answer_ne: Freelance income lai business income manine ra slab anusar tax lagcha. Bidesh bata income bhayema 2% VAT lagne byabastha cha.
answer_en: Freelance income is treated as business income and taxed per slabs. Income from abroad faces a 2% VAT rule.
answer_short_ne: Freelance income lai business income manine ra slab anusar tax lagcha.

question: Capital reduction ma tax cha?
question_ne: Capital reduction ma tax cha?
question_en: Is there tax on capital reduction?
question_normalized: capital reduction ma tax cha
answer_ne: Company le capital reduce garda shareholder le prapta garne raka lai dividend distribution manincha ra 5% withholding tax lagcha.
answer_en: When a company reduces capital, the amount received by shareholders is treated as dividend distribution, attracting a 5% withholding tax.
answer_short_ne: Company le capital reduce garda shareholder le prapta garne raka lai dividend distribution manincha ra 5% withholding tax lagcha.

question: Ghar bhada bhatta ma tax kati?
question_ne: Ghar bhada bhatta ma tax kati?
question_en: Is house rent allowance taxable?
question_normalized: ghar bhada bhatta ma tax kati
answer_ne: Salary ko hisab ma ghar bhada bhatta prapta garne karmachari lai Rs 25,000 barshik samma suwidha kar mukt cha.
answer_en: Employees receiving house rent allowance as part of salary get a tax-free benefit of up to Rs 25,000 per year.
answer_short_ne: Salary ko hisab ma ghar bhada bhatta prapta garne karmachari lai Rs 25,000 barshik samma suwidha kar mukt cha.

topic: Tax on Royalty and License Fees
question: License renewal garda tax kati?
question_ne: License renewal garda tax kati?
question_en: What is the tax on license renewal?
question_normalized: license renewal garda tax kati
answer_ne: Byawasaya license renewal garda staniya sarkar le nirdharit garne soolka matra ho, tara royalty/rights bhuktanima 15% TDS lagcha.
answer_en: Business license renewal only involves local government fees, but 15% TDS applies to royalty/rights payments.
answer_short_ne: Byawasaya license renewal garda staniya sarkar le nirdharit garne soolka matra ho, tara royalty/rights bhuktanima 15% TDS lagcha.
legal_reference: Income Tax Act, Local Govt Act
